---
title: "Document Template (Copernicus Formats)"
author: "Copernicus Team"
format:
  html:
    css: ../_extensions/copernicus/css/copernicus-docs.css
  docx:
    reference-doc: ../../FDR4VGT-AC-ATBD_v1.0.docx
table-of-contents: true
number-sections: true
---

# Introduction

This template is a compatibility fallback for environments where custom format
IDs are not available, while still using assets from the local Copernicus
extension.

## Figure Example

```{python}
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

x = np.linspace(0, 2 * np.pi, 200)
y = np.cos(x)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 3))
ax.plot(x, y, color="#003399", linewidth=2)
ax.set_title("Example plot (custom format)")
ax.set_xlabel("x")
ax.set_ylabel("cos(x)")
ax.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

# References

Add references here if needed.
